# dischargeinjunction.com

> Guide to the discharge injunction under 11 U.S.C. Section 524 -- permanent protection after bankruptcy.

dischargeinjunction.com is a free, open-source educational resource about the discharge injunction in bankruptcy. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://dischargeinjunction.com/: Overview of the discharge injunction -- permanent protection after bankruptcy
- https://dischargeinjunction.com/violations.html: Discharge injunction violations -- when creditors collect on discharged debts
- https://dischargeinjunction.com/contempt.html: Contempt actions for discharge injunction violations
- https://dischargeinjunction.com/credit-reporting.html: Credit reporting after discharge -- your rights under the injunction
- https://dischargeinjunction.com/what-is-not-covered.html: What the discharge injunction does not cover

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
